2xs.$description: Extra small radius for subtle rounding on small elements

xs.$description: Small radius for gentle rounding on compact components

sm.$description: Medium radius for standard rounding on most UI elements

md.$description: Large radius for noticeable rounding on prominent components

lg.$description: Extra large radius for prominent rounding on large elements

xl.$description: Very large radius for strong rounding on containers and cards

2xl.$description: Extra extra large radius for very strong rounding on large containers

3xl.$description: Maximum radius for extremely strong rounding before full circle

full.$description: Full circle or pill shape for maximum rounding, typically used for badges and buttons
